# Economically deployable quantum systems for sovereign HPC infrastructure. Designed for the next era.
Anyon designs, builds and deploys integrated quantum computing systems for HPC, government, universities and strategic partners.
Latest news2026
Anyon Systems awarded $23 million CAD under the Canadian Quantum Champions Program.
[Read](https://www.newswire.ca/news-releases/anyon-systems-awarded-23-million-cad-under-the-canadian-quantum-champions-program-890755880.html)
Anyon Facts
Montréal
Headquarters
Built in Canada
Full-stack
Approach
Hardware + software
Superconducting
Platform
Qubit technology
We do not view quantum computing as a laboratory curiosity. We view it as the next layer of critical computing infrastructure.
What we ship
## Three products. One vertically integrated stack.
![](https://anyonsys.com/assets/site-images/hudson_02.jpg?v=cfc17f3)
### Hudson
Our next-generation superconducting quantum computer enclosure. First system delivering to Defence R&D Canada in 2026.
[Read more](https://anyonsys.com/en/products#hudson)
![](https://anyonsys.com/assets/site-images/qube.jpg?v=cfc17f3)
### Qube
24-qubit integrated superconducting quantum computer. MonarQ instance live at the Calcul Québec data centre, integrated into Canada’s national HPC infrastructure.
[Read more](https://anyonsys.com/en/products#qube)
![](https://anyonsys.com/assets/site-images/pexels-kampus-8353772.jpg?v=cfc17f3)
### Snowflurry
Processor-to-application software: pulse-level control, circuit compilation, and algorithm libraries. Built and tested in-house, distributed under an open-source license.
[Read more](https://anyonsys.com/en/products#snowflurry)
Trusted by research, government and HPC
